name: BANANO BROS.
short_description: Banano Bros is a retro arcade game inspired by the old time classics of the 80's. This game is a vertical endless runner with procedurally generated obstacles where your only goal is trying to beat your own record and playing with your friends.
detailed_description:
Banano Bros is a retro arcade game inspired by the old time classics of the 80's. This game is a vertical endless runner with procedurally generated obstacles where your only goal is trying to beat your own record and playing with your friends.

Key Features

  • Play in singleplayer, local cooperative multiplayer or local versus multiplayer.
  • Attract your partner to you to save him from death or kill him in versus mode.
  • Climb to the clouds and collect bananos to multiply your score.
  • Dodge insects and coconuts.
  • Retro pixel graphics inspired in the old game systems.
  • Awesome retro music made by the artist Ozzed.
  • Steam archievements.
  • Compatible with gamepad.
